value.found_quote:
Manage agent access
Learn how to manage access to your agents deployed on Agent Platform, such as agent identity, service accounts, API keys, and OAuth clients.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Manage agent access" guide that covers agent identity, service accounts, API keys, and OAuth clients — matching all elements of the claim. The page is marked as "Preview" under Pre-GA Offerings Terms, indicating this feature is not yet generally available.
